name: burrete
description: macOS menu bar app and Quick Look extension for molecular previews: Mol* 3D, fast XYZ, xyzrender SVG, and RDKit grids.

scripts.check:js: node --check PreviewExtension/Web/viewer.js && node --check PreviewExtension/Web/burette-agent.js && node --check PreviewExtension/Web/grid-viewer.js && node --check PreviewExtension/Web/xyz-fast.js && node --check scripts/vendor-molstar.mjs && node --check scripts/vendor-rdkit.mjs && node --check scripts/agent-preview.mjs && node --check scripts/check-release-version.mjs
